title: AI-native Growth Marketing Associate (f/m/d)
required_skills: Strong execution skills and bias toward action
bonus_skills: Growth marketing or digital marketing experience
AEO, SEO, analytics, CRO, or A/B testing familiarity
matched_skills: Growth marketing experience (GTM strategy, Product Marketing Manager roles)
Google Analytics (partial match for analytics familiarity)
core_responsibilities: Own the website as a core growth channel; build, update, and optimize landing pages and site content
Manage the CMS and maintain website speed, accuracy, and quality
Execute growth experiments across messaging, conversion, and acquisition
Use AI tools to accelerate research, content production, and workflow automation
Work directly with the CMO on high-priority growth and operations projects
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any hands-on use of AI tools (ChatGPT, Copilot, etc.) for content, research, or workflow automation
Emphasize GTM execution and product launch ownership to demonstrate growth marketing orientation
Surface any website-adjacent work (landing pages, content updates, analytics tracking) even if not primary role
Stress organizational ability and managing multiple workstreams (Jira, Confluence, Agile)
Position Product Marketing Manager experience as overlap with growth marketing and CMO-adjacent work

company_info.size_raw: €15M Series A (no explicit headcount found in JD)
